scripts.build: bun build --compile --external chromium-bidi --external electron src/server.ts --outfile dist/gmaps-retag
scripts.build:all: mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --external chromium-bidi --external electron --target=bun-linux-x64 src/server.ts --outfile dist/gmaps-retag-linux-x64 && bun build --compile --external chromium-bidi --external electron --target=bun-linux-arm64 src/server.ts --outfile dist/gmaps-retag-linux-arm64 && bun build --compile --external chromium-bidi --external electron --target=bun-darwin-x64 src/server.ts --outfile dist/gmaps-retag-macos-x64 && bun build --compile --external chromium-bidi --external electron --target=bun-darwin-arm64 src/server.ts --outfile dist/gmaps-retag-macos-arm64 && bun build --compile --external chromium-bidi --external electron --target=bun-windows-x64 src/server.ts --outfile dist/gmaps-retag-win-x64.exe
